problem id: 41f574f5
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(4)

examples:
  11110111 -> 01110000
  00000010 -> 00100000
  11010101 -> 01010000
  10111111 -> 11110000
  01111010 -> 10100000
  00100111 -> 01110000
  01011001 -> 10010000
  00110111 -> 01110000
  11101000 -> 10000000

query: 10011010
predicted answer: 10100000
